text.name: afm_noVehiclesFound
text.text: This farm does not currently own any vehicles.

text.name: afm_noToolsFound
text.text: This farm does not currently own any tools.

text.name: afm_noPlaceablesFound
text.text: This farm does not currently own any placeables.

text.name: afm_sellVehicleConfirm
text.text: Do you really want to sell this vehicle for %s?

text.name: afm_hotkeystring
text.text: Use 1-9 keys to set or un-set vehicle HotKey

text.name: afm_help_page_vehicle_base_text
text.text:
This section of Advanced Farm Manager helps to manage your enterable vehicles. Tractors, Cars, Trucks, and other self propelled implements will appear here.
In this area, you can set hot keys for these vehicles, set the parking status of the vehicle, and assign the vehicle a nick name.
Using the 'Enter Vehicle' key bind (SPACE) or double clicking a vehicle will enter that vehicle if possible.
Additionally, you can sell, return, clean, repair, repaint, and refuel your vehicles.
Using the 'Vehicle Switching' key bind (Default is Left Alt + Number Pad Zero), you can toggle between TAB switching between all vehicles and only those vehicles that have a hotkey assinged.

text.name: afm_help_page_vehicle_detail_text
text.text:
To set a hot key, use the 1-9 number keys (keyboard or numeric keypad). The current hotkey will appear to the left of the vehicle name. Only one vehicle may be assigned per hotkey. To un-set a hotkey, press that number again.
Vehicles displayed in yellow text / with a motor icon are currently running.
Vehicles displayed in grey text / with a parking brake icon are currently parked.
Vehicles displayed in red text have a damage value that may impact the efficiency of the vehicle.

text.name: afm_help_page_implement_base_text
text.text:
This section of Advanced Farm Manager helps you manage your implements.
Using the 'Warp' key bind (SPACE) or double clicking a implement will warp near that implement.
In this area, you can sell, return, clean, repair, and repaint your implements.
Implements displayed in red text have a damage value that may impact the efficiency of the implement.

text.name: afm_help_page_placeable_base_text
text.text:
This section of Advanced Farm Manager helps you manage your placeables.
In this area, you can sell any placeables that you own. It is recommended that you save prior to selling any 'unusual' placeables, as they may remove more than you are expecting.
Using the 'Warp' key bind (SPACE) or double clicking a placeable will warp near that placeable.
The listed location is the map region the placeable is in.

text.name: afm_help_page_field_base_text
text.text:
This section of Advanced Farm Manager helps to visualize the fields on the map.
Using the 'Warp' keybind (SPACE) or double clicking a field will warp near that field.
Listed here is the owner of the field, and if it's a NPC, shows if there is a contract available or in progress on that field.
In this area, you will also find the fruit and it's status for each field. If a fruit is listed as '--', that field is currently empty.
The listed location is the map region the field is in.

text.name: afm_noAvailVehicle
text.text: No HotKey Vehicles are available to enter

text.name: afm_sellAnimalsConfirm
text.text: Do you want to sell all animals in this husbandry for %s?
